'''Gemmy''' or '''Gemmie''' was a [[Korun/Legends|Korunnai]] [[Gender/Legends|woman]] who was [[Marriage/Legends|married]] to a [[Balawai]] militia officer during the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] leading up to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Her husband and his partner, [[Lou]], allowed [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] to reach the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] control system located beneath the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Pelek Baw/Legends|Pelek Baw]], on their homeworld of [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]]. Thus the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] was able to defeat the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] fleet and put an end to the [[Summertime War]].<ref name="Encyc" /><ref name="Shatter" />

==Behind the scenes==
Gemmy was first introduced in [[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']] as "Gemmy"<ref name="Shatter">[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']]</ref> and had an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' where her name was spelled as "Gemmie".<ref name="Encyc">{{CSWECite|I|330|Gemmie}}</ref>
